name: Heliocor
description: Obtain enlightenment with this massive hammer that performs a Codex scan on each fatal strike. Scans require an equipped Codex Scanner and an available charge.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Obtain enlightenment with this massive hammer that performs a Codex scan on each fatal strike. Scans require an equipped Codex Scanner and an available charge.

components.name: Gammacor
components.description: Designed to quickly vaporize minerals for content analysis, users discovered its powerful beam was equally efficient at dispatching hostiles.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Argon Crystal
components.description:
A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Designed to quickly vaporize minerals for content analysis, users discovered its powerful beam was equally efficient at dispatching hostiles.

components.name: Circuits
components.description:
Various electronic components.

Location: Venus, Ceres, and the Kuva Fortress

components.name: Plastids
components.description:
A disgusting nanite-infested tissue mass.

Location: Phobos, Saturn, Uranus, Pluto, and Eris

components.name: Morphics
components.description:
An amorphous solid. Possibly Orokin technology.

Location: Mercury, Mars, Phobos, Europa, and Pluto

components.name: Polymer Bundle
components.description:
A hard, thermoplastic casing. Manufactured by Corpus.

Location: Mercury, Venus, and Uranus

components.name: Rubedo
components.description:
A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

Location: Earth, Lua, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, and the Void

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: Hotfix 27.3.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Heliocor having the incorrect Energy color.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 25.4.1 + 25.4.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed incorrect Energy color being applied to the Synoid Heliocor’s handle.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Hotfix 24.5.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Synoid Heliocor displaying as the regular Heliocor in the Appearance section of the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed kill scan mechanic (Synoid Heliocor, Astral Autopsy Mod) not functioning.

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Heliocor appearing unfolded when holstered on your Warframe’s back in the Relays.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.11.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Heliocor’s ring FX appearing while holstered in the Relay.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 19.0.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error with Heliocor’s effects.

patchlogs.name: Update 19: The War Within
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Heliocor appearing invisible when initiating a stealth attack when not in ‘sword alone’ mode.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: U2.1 + U2.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Synoid Heliocor hologram not displaying the Cephalon Suda symbol.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Heliocor not having information on its Blueprint location (Simaris) in the Market.
